name: SafetyCulture (iAuditor) Inspection and Safety API
what_it_does: SafetyCulture (iAuditor) inspection and safety management REST API for operations teams, safety managers, and field inspectors to manage inspections, audits, checklists, and safety observations across industrial, construction, hospitality, and retail operations. Enables AI agents to manage inspection template creation and deployment for operational audit workflow automation, handle inspection completion and finding capture for safety observation automation, access corrective action assignment and tracking for safety improvement automation, retrieve inspection score and compliance rate for operations performance automation, manage issue and observation reporting for safety event management automation, handle asset and equipment inspection scheduling for preventive maintenance automation, access training assignment and completion tracking for workforce safety compliance automation, retrieve head count and emergency mustering for safety headcount automation, manage sensor data and IoT alert integration for safety monitoring automation, and integrate SafetyCulture with HRIS, CMMS, and ERP systems for end-to-end operational safety management.
use_cases: Scheduling safety inspections from operations compliance automation agents
Tracking corrective actions from safety management automation agents
Reporting inspection scores from operational performance agents
Managing equipment audits from maintenance operations agents
not_for: Enterprise GRC and SOX compliance (use MetricStream or AuditBoard)
Clinical safety and adverse event reporting (use MedWatch or Veeva Vault Safety)
best_when: A construction, manufacturing, hospitality, or retail operations team wanting AI agents to automate inspection scheduling, field audit capture, corrective action management, and safety performance reporting within SafetyCulture's operational safety platform.
avoid_when: OSHA RECORDABLE INCIDENT CLASSIFICATION ACCURACY: Automated incident reporting via SafetyCulture must correctly classify OSHA recordable vs non-recordable incidents before submission to OSHA 300 log; automated classification without OSHA recordability analysis creates incorrect 300 log and OSHA inspection non-compliance. CONTRACTOR WORKER SAFETY DATA SHARING: Automated safety observation sharing via SafetyCulture for contractor workers must comply with contractor data privacy agreements; automated sharing of contractor worker safety incident data with client operations systems without contractor consent creates data sharing agreement violation. FOOD SERVICE INSPECTION REGULATORY SUBMISSION: Automated food safety inspection data via SafetyCulture for regulatory reporting must meet health department format requirements; SafetyCulture inspection data does not automatically fulfill regulatory submission requirements; automated FDA or health department submission requires proper regulatory format conversion.

auth.notes: SafetyCulture uses OAuth 2.0 with scopes. REST API with JSON. Sydney, Australia HQ. Founded 2004 by Luke Anear. Private (~$450M raised, Tiger Global, Index Ventures). Originally iAuditor mobile inspection app, rebranded to SafetyCulture. 70,000+ customers globally. Inspection templates, real-time issue capture, corrective actions, training, IoT sensors. Construction, manufacturing, hospitality, retail, and healthcare verticals. Competes with Intelex, Cority, and VelocityEHS for operational safety management.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free tier for small teams with limited templates, inspections, and seats
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-seat monthly subscription; Premium and Enterprise tiers with advanced features and API access; API access on Premium and above
pricing.notes: Sydney AU. Private (~$450M raised). Founded 2004. Per-seat monthly subscription. Free tier for small teams. Premium for API access. Enterprise for full features.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; inspection and action queries throttled; webhooks for inspection and action events

known_agent_gotchas: OSHA RECORDABILITY CLASSIFICATION GATE: SafetyCulture incident capture API collects incident data but does not classify OSHA recordability; automated 300 log population using SafetyCulture incident data must apply OSHA 300.4 recordability criteria before logging; automated OSHA 300 logging without recordability analysis creates incorrect OSHA log entries and potential OSHA violation

CORRECTIVE ACTION OWNER ASSIGNMENT NOTIFICATION: Automated corrective action creation via SafetyCulture API with owner assignment does not guarantee owner is aware without explicit notification; automated corrective action assignment must trigger notification to assigned owner via SafetyCulture notification or external channel; unnotified corrective action owner creates missed remediation and open finding persistence

TEMPLATE SCORING WEIGHT CALCULATION: SafetyCulture inspection template scoring uses weighted question calculation; automated inspection score reporting must use template-specific scoring weight configuration; automated score comparison across inspections using different template versions creates score comparison error if template weights changed between inspection periods

MEDIA UPLOAD ASYNC PROCESSING: SafetyCulture photo and video attachments to inspection findings are processed asynchronously after upload; automated inspection workflow that reads finding media immediately after submission may receive empty media list; implement media processing completion poll before automated finding media analysis or export

IOT SENSOR DATA LATENCY FOR REAL-TIME ALERTS: SafetyCulture sensor integration for temperature, gas, and environmental monitoring has processing latency; automated safety alert triggered by sensor threshold breach has data lag relative to physical sensor reading; design automated safety alert with latency tolerance rather than expecting real-time sensor-to-alert response

GDPR RIGHT TO ERASURE FOR WORKER SAFETY DATA: SafetyCulture stores worker safety observation and incident data; GDPR right to erasure requests from EU worker data subjects must remove worker identification from inspection findings; automated data retention without GDPR erasure capability for EU operations creates GDPR compliance gap for worker-identified safety observations
agent_readiness.security_notes: Operational safety management. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU/AU. Workplace safety data, inspection findings, and worker safety records.

security_score_components.security_notes: Safety management. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU/AU. Worker safety, inspection, and operational data.
